rationale.R1.1: The artifact needs a stronger conceptual framing to justify the practical advantage of QMaster over policy-gradient baselines.
rationale.R1.3: The evidence-claim alignment is weak, particularly in justifying why QMaster's value-based approach leads to superior sample efficiency.
rationale.R1.4: The novelty assessment is insufficient; the artifact needs a clearer contrast with existing methods and a stronger claim about its unique contributions.
